title: centella glabrata var. linifolia
intro: Centella glabrata var. linifolia, also known as Indian pennywort or Brahmi, is a perennial plant native to tropical regions, characterized by its small, yellowish-green flowers and heart-shaped leaves. Traditionally, Centella glabrata var. linifolia has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Centella glabrata var. linifolia include improved cognitive function, enhanced memory and concentration, reduced stress and anxiety, and improved skin and wound healing. Centella glabrata var. linifolia is often prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to promote overall well-being.
